python3 -c "
import re, json

with open('/home/user/rork-app/expo/.env') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Extract GITHUB_TOKEN - find github_pat_ pattern
gh_match = re.search(r'github_pat_[A-Za-z0-9_]+', content)
gh_token = gh_match.group(0) if gh_match else ''

# Extract RENDER_API_KEY - find rnd_ pattern
rk_match = re.search(r'rnd_[A-Za-z0-9]+', content)
rk_token = rk_match.group(0) if rk_match else ''

# Extract SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY - find JWT pattern
sk_match = re.search(r'(eyJ[A-Za-z0-9\-_]+?\.[A-Za-z0-9\-_]+?\.[A-Za-z0-9\-_]+)', content)
sk_token = sk_match.group(0) if sk_match else ''

# Extract project ref from JWT
import base64
if sk_token:
    parts = sk_token.split('.')
    if len(parts) >= 2:
        # Add padding
        padded = parts[1] + '=' * (4 - len(parts[1]) % 4)
        try:
            decoded = base64.urlsafe_b64decode(padded)
            jwt_body = json.loads(decoded)
            project_ref = jwt_body.get('ref', '')
            su_url = f'https://{project_ref}.supabase.co' if project_ref else ''
        except:
            su_url = ''
    else:
        su_url = ''
else:
    su_url = ''

print(f'GH_TOKEN={gh_token}')
print(f'RK_TOKEN={rk_token}')
print(f'SK_TOKEN={sk_token}')
print(f'SU_URL={su_url}')
"
